subcodes.first_line: The fire of oppression hath been kindled in the world, and by its flames have been consumed the hearts of them that have believed in God, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشتعلت نار الظلم فی العالم و بها احترقت افئده الذین آمنوا بالله الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
